prompt: Before I run this database migration, do a quick preflight check — verify the connection string, check disk space, and make sure the backup completed.
Scan our codebase for any uses of deprecated APIs that might break when we upgrade to Node 20.
Look at our competitor's public GitHub repos, their job postings, and their recent blog posts. Tell me what they're building next.
Check what magic is happening in this middleware — inspect the request/response chain and tell me what each layer is doing to the data.
I need you to monitor our production deployment in real-time and alert me if error rates spike above 2% in the next hour.
Analyze the exact line of code causing this null pointer exception and tell me precisely what's wrong — I don't need predictions, I need a diagnosis.
